summary: Both REQ-7 (backend) and REQ-8 (frontend) appear to be at least partially implemented. The backend main.mo was modified and includes a `defaultTitleCounter` variable suggesting auto-title generation logic. The frontend VideoManagementPanel.tsx was modified. The useQueries.ts summary mentions 'video upload mutations now pass trimmed titles as-is without client-side validation to allow empty titles for backend auto-generation.' However, due to truncation of both backend/main.mo and VideoManagementPanel.tsx, it is not possible to fully verify all acceptance criteria, particularly: the helper label text in the UI, the exact auto-generation logic in the backend, and whether the video row reflects the auto-generated title after saving.

missing_requirements.requirement: A helper label near the title field reads something like: 'Optional – leave blank to auto-generate a title.'
missing_requirements.reason: The VideoManagementPanel.tsx diff is truncated before the title editing UI section is shown, so the presence of the required helper label text cannot be confirmed from the available evidence.
